Course Gallery

Courses I Developed

Each course was built from scratch — syllabus, scripts, video production coordination, workbooks, assessments, and pre-sales trailer/overview content. SMEs ranged from corporate professionals to public figures and celebrities.

Video Trailer Examples

Pre-Sales Scripts & Video Trailers

I wrote the scripts and designed the content structure for each course trailer — crafted to convert prospective learners by clearly communicating course value, SME credibility, and learning outcomes.

My Process

End-to-End Production Flow

01
Needs Analysis
Market research & topic roadmap aligned to 60,000+ user needs
02
Syllabus Design
Chapter structure using Bloom's Taxonomy for effective learning progression
03
Script Writing
Learning video scripts + pre-sales trailer scripts for each course
04
SME Coordination
Collaborated with public figures & celebrities as course instructors
05
Production QC
Quality control across 200+ videos, workbooks & assessments
06
LMS Launch
Input to LMS, copywriting course pages, pricing, and post-launch monitoring
